text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I walk into my office one day, only to find...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
My shoe divination and my flower divination
techniques both told me it was definitely going to
rain today!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe that divine prophecy didn't come
true... This is definitely misfortune at play!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Argh! At this rate, a procession of sumo wrestlers
is going to stop me from crossing the street, or a
sudden gust of wind will have my shrine offerings
sinking to the bottom of a pond!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I do my best to put Matikanefukukitaru at ease,
but her wild imagination ends up throwing her out
of sorts.
